name: Reckless Getaway 2: Car Chase
description: Ready for the ultimate adrenaline rush? Step into the drivers seat in Reckless Getaway 2: Ultimate Police Escape, the most intense action racing game on mobile! Immerse yourself in a thrilling chase as you navigate through city streets and off-road terrain, outrunning cop cars, SUVs, SWAT teams, helicopters, and even tanks!
